form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when eighth (23.05) at this track in a Maiden. Will jump from box 1 for the first time. Has the ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 13 lengths behind Hara's Harper over 498m. Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (29.97) in a Restricted WIN, finishing a 18 length fifth. Has one success and three minors from seven starts from box 3. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 14 over 380m at this track in a Grade 5. Others read better.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Restricted WIN at this track when a 3 length second but did run a fast 28.87 over the 498m trip. Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.5 lengths in 22.18, beating Strawberry Wine. Last start finished 6th on April 2 over 380m at this track behind White Car beaten 8 lengths (22.55) in a Restricted WIN. Racing well and has to be included.
